summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the ZentraQR waitlist/whitelist system. All backend APIs are working correctly and frontend integration is fully functional.
passed_tests: POST /api/waitlist creates new waitlist entry (returns 200 status)
POST /api/waitlist correctly rejects duplicate email with 400 status
Frontend landing page loads correctly in waitlist mode
Frontend shows waitlist form when landing_mode='waitlist'
Frontend shows pricing section when landing_mode='plans'
Backoffice Launch tab shows landing mode selector controls
Backoffice Whitelist tab shows waitlist entries with management controls
Backoffice can successfully change landing mode between 'plans' and 'waitlist'
Landing mode changes reflect immediately on frontend
Waitlist status updates work in backoffice
Waitlist entry deletion works in backoffice
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (9/9 tests passed)
